title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Teach For India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Teach For India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Join the Teach For India Ventures Solutions family as a Teacher in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Teach For India Ventures Solutions:
Teach For India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Teach For India Ventures Solutions!
